Another sign that baseball is just around the corner is marked annually by the release of Topps Series 1. The 2026 version is set to be released tomorrow (Feb. 11); although, you can already find plenty of early arrivals right now on eBay.

Transforming dynamic duos into Pops! is now easier with Pop! Yourself 2-Packs. Customize Pop! #1 then design Pop! #2 and top it all off with a personalized 2-pack box. Build yours on Funko.com!

Get ready for a summer full of fun activities with Freddy Funko and his trusty pup, Proto. There’s PEZ Freddy Funko, Pop! Floaty Freddy (normal and blacklight), Pop! Freddy Bowling Trophy, Pop! Fun on the Run Freddy, and Pop! Proto.
